whispering_well.name: Whispering Well
whispering_well.text: A violet well remembers every failed brew.

bound_alchemist.name: The Bound Alchemist
bound_alchemist.text: Chains bind a brewer to an ancient table.

mirror_cauldron.name: Mirror Cauldron
mirror_cauldron.text: Your reflection offers strength at a price.

bone_oracle.name: Bone Oracle
bone_oracle.text: Ivory dice rattle with possible futures.

cursed_chest.name: Cursed Royal Cache
cursed_chest.text: Gold light leaks through a seal of black wax.

ember_camp.name: Ember Camp
ember_camp.text: A quiet flame offers one moment of preparation.
